overall.description: Gameplay footage from a Batman video game showing the character walking along an elevated industrial bridge at night through a covered metal corridor and emerging onto an open walkway overlooking a neon-lit Gothic cityscape with cable cars passing by. The scene features dark atmospheric lighting with teal and blue tones characteristic of Gotham City.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial bridge corridor with metal arches

events.description: exiting the enclosed metal corridor into open air elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: Batman walking steadily through the enclosed metal bridge corridor with glass walls

entered.detail: curved metal support beams with visible rivets forming a tunnel-like structure
transparent glass panels set between metal frames on the right side of the walkway
metal plate flooring with industrial texture and rivet details

segments.scene_description: Batman walks through a narrow enclosed corridor of an elevated industrial bridge. The space is defined by curved metal arches with rivets and glass panels on the right side, with dim lighting and a view of distant city lights ahead through the corridor opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated transit bridge overlooking neon-lit downtown

events.description: emerging from covered corridor onto open elevated bridge with panoramic city view
cable car system becomes visible moving along parallel track

agents.ego_description: Batman continuing along the open walkway, overlooking the sprawling neon-lit cityscape below

notable_agents.action: cable car moving along elevated track, passing by the walkway from right to left

entered.detail: transparent glass barrier with metal handrail along the edge of the walkway
dense collection of tall buildings illuminated with blue and purple neon lights
elevated metal rail system supporting moving cable cars
tall yellow cranes silhouetted against the night sky above buildings

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the enclosed corridor, the scene opens to a wide elevated bridge with glass railings overlooking a sprawling Gothic cityscape bathed in neon light. Cable cars move along parallel tracks while construction cranes dot the skyline, and Batman continues walking along the exposed walkway with the city lights glittering below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a vast, neon-lit urban panorama. It begins with Batman walking through a narrow enclosed bridge defined by curved metal arches and riveted glass panels under dim lighting. As he moves forward, the confined space opens up, shifting from the shadows of the corridor to the bright, expansive atmosphere of an elevated walkway. The scene then expands to reveal a sprawling Gothic cityscape where cable cars glide along parallel tracks and construction cranes pierce the skyline. Finally, the camera continues along the glass railings, overlooking the glittering teal and blue lights of the city below.
